=== no_menus
# MenuBar with no menus — empty bar.
widget: menubar
width: 30
height: 1
===

=== single_menu
# MenuBar with one menu entry; no focus.
widget: menubar
width: 30
height: 1
menu: &File
===
 File

=== multiple_menus
# MenuBar with three menu entries; no focus.
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 1
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
menu: &Help
===
 File │ Edit │ Help

=== focused_first
# MenuBar with focus on the first menu (cursor=0, menu_focused=true).
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 1
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
menu: &Help
menu_cursor: 0
menu_focused: true
===
 File │ Edit │ Help

=== focused_second
# MenuBar with focus on the second menu.
widget: menubar
width: 40
height: 1
menu: &File
menu: &Edit
menu: &Help
menu_cursor: 1
menu_focused: true
===
 File │ Edit │ Help
